docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/02/26 CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO BLUEGROUND VIA MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,853.00 FILED BY RIZZO, LOGAN AS TO DEFENDANT BLUEGROUND US, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-06-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LOGAN RIZZO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BLUEGROUND US, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT PARTIES HAVE REACHED A PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-06-2026 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-02-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BLUEGROUND US, INC.
